text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: madpilot
Date: Tue Feb  2 23:33:56 UTC 2016
New revision: 407910
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/407910

Log:
  libqtelegram-aseman-edition is a fork of libqtelegram by Aseman Team which is
  porting to windows and mac alongside linux support. It's also build using qmake
  instead of cmake.

  WWW: https://github.com/Aseman-Land/libqtelegram-aseman-edition

  PR:		204348
  Submitted by:	Henry Hu <henry.hu.sh@gmail.com>

Changes:
  head/net-im/Makefile
  head/net-im/libqtelegram-ae/
  head/net-im/libqtelegram-ae/Makefile
  head/net-im/libqtelegram-ae/distinfo
  head/net-im/libqtelegram-ae/pkg-descr
  head/net-im/libqtelegram-ae/pkg-plist
